item.title: Air Force One to lead the way with red-white-blue-gold pattern, replacing Kennedy-era colors
item.description: Air Force One and other planes in the executive transportation fleet are getting a new color scheme that President Trump has wanted since his first ad...

item.title: Man dies in ICE custody in Chicago area
item.description: A 59-year-old man died this week while in the custody of ICE, marking the seventh death so far in 2026, Senate Democrats said Wednesday.

item.title: NIH chief to become CDC acting director
item.description: Jay Bhattacharya, the director of the National Institutes of Health, has been tapped as acting head of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention ...

item.title: Hakeem Jeffries meets with Maryland Democrats, amping up pressure to redistrict
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries took a day trip to meet with Maryland Gov. Wes Moore and other state Democrats on Wednesday to continue the push...

item.title: Trump's economic interventions spark free-market debate within the party of Reagan
item.description: President Trump recently ordered the Department of Defense to prioritize coal energy over other forms of energy, leaning into a personal brand of "Tru...
